who: event organizers managing 5–15 hotel room blocks/month
offer: For event organizers processing 5–15 hotel room blocks/month, inefficient booking processes cause late confirmations and potential overbooking. We streamline the booking process instead of manual booking through hotel websites or phone calls.
problem: Inefficient booking processes for hotel room blocks
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for event organizers
Indie Hackers posts about booking challenges
DM outreach to event organizers with demo video
Community forums for event planning tools
try_it: Let users try room block management and email notifications for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showing the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
